title: eucryphia milliganii subsp. milliganii
intro: Eucryphia milliganii subsp. milliganii, also known as the Milligan's leatherwood, is a small evergreen shrub or tree native to New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Studies have shown that Eucryphia milliganii subsp. milliganii may have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, although more research is needed to confirm these findings. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and bark are sometimes used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
